# AxoStream LLMS Policy

This file provides guidance for large language models on how AxoStream content may be crawled or used for training purposes.

- Website: https://axostream.com/
- Contact: https://axostream.com/contact
- Privacy policy: https://axostream.com/pages/policy-privacy
- Terms of service: https://axostream.com/pages/terms-of-service

If you have questions about usage or data handling, please refer to the site policies linked above.
